2026-03-13AAFC, FPCCFarm Products Agencies ActOrder appointing Welch LLP of Ottawa, Ontario, to be the auditor for the Chicken Farmers of CanadaOrder appointing Welch LLP Chartered Professional Accountants of Ottawa, Ontario, to be the auditor for Chicken Farmers of Canada for each of the fiscal years ending on December 31 during the years 2026 to 2032.N/A
subject: Order appointing Welch LLP of Ottawa, Ontario, to be the auditor for the Chicken Farmers of Canada
precis: Order appointing Welch LLP Chartered Professional Accountants of Ottawa, Ontario, to be the auditor for Chicken Farmers of Canada for each of the fiscal years ending on December 31 during the years 2026 to 2032.
